title: FINANCIAL LITERACY AND COACHING - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY BANK FINANCIAL LITERACY AND COACHING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial literacy workshops on budgeting, responsible use of credit and debt, financial recovery, and identity protection. Also offers one-on-one financial coaching. 38975 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 668-2560 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 668-2560 Lisa Elwood [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah and Clackamas Counties Services: Personal Financial Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY BANK
